text_block_list.name: Taiyaki Shop Attendant
text_block_list.text:
Taiyaki! Taiyaki! Get yer taiyaki hot and steamin' right off the press!
This'll be today's last!
choice_data_list: Excuse me, can I get that—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: One taiyaki pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-wh-whoa, sorry! Please, go on ahead!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: No, we kinda both got here at the same time and... Oh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mm! Soft and flaky, chewy-gooey deliciousness. And now I'm stuffed!
choice_data_list: Sorry for taking half of it.
Sorry for taking half of it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Nah nah, snacks are even tastier when you share! And you're a trainer
at the academy, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
This has gotta be more than chance. Hopefully we get to meet again
soon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And just a few days later...

text_block_list.name: Meat Bun Shop Attendant
text_block_list.text:
Meat buns, meat buns! Meet yer new favorite snack—my last remainin'
meat bun!
choice_data_list: Excuse me, can I get that—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: One meat bun pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-wh-whoa, sorr— Geh, heeeh? It's you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho, I s'pose lightning can strike the same place twice. Shall we
go halfsies today too? Heehee.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And after a few more days of our bellies crying out at the same time
and place...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, good morning! Hey hey, check out this pic!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Muhuhu. Somehow someway, I managed to snag that new spider
plushie! Isn't he so cute?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've become something like small talk buddies, and chats like this
are common whenever we run into each other in the academy halls.
Then one day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several students are engaged in ramp training, led by Mihono
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: First ramp dash complete. Commencing second dash.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Is she really going for another? No waaay!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Phew... This is rough!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Nooo... waaay... Haaa... Urgh, and here I thought I finally... built up
some stamina.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though some of her peers seem to be quite spent,
Matikanetannhauser presses behind Mihono Bourbon up the ramp
once more.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... whew... huff!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Third run. Adding two hundred meters. Huff!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: M-me toooo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... phew... Couldn't quite... cut it... that time... Bourbon's really somethin' else... Wah!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehe, I'm okay, I'm okay! My legs are just a little shaky. Looks like I've
still got work to do.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Really? 'Cause you were pretty awesome up till those last three
hundred meters. You were right on her tail!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon's regimen is known throughout the academy as being
especially tough. Most students give up after one ramp dash.
choice_data_list:
(She's really got it where it counts. Just needs a
bit of extra polish...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, haven't they been at it for a while now? Like over two hours or
something at this point? Looks like they're really serious about
interval training.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Right behind, right behind, stay right... behind... Haaa, I'm totally at my limit!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... I gotta stop! Thought I had a bit more stamina than that!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: No, that was great! You put up a great fight, Machitan.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well thank ya very kindly! Hm? Oh! Now since when have you
been standin' there?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Kinda wish you came when I was actually running at my best. I really
thought I'd be able to finish that round, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But ya know, I really did pick up on some good long-distance tricks.
Yeah, that was a pretty good sesh. Gotta jot these down before I
forget...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I need to think of more ways to raise my stamina, and I should
probably try out a form with less air resistance... Mun.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, while I've got you here, Trainer. Um, would you mind giving
me some pointers?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
My goal this month is to get tough! I wanna up my stamina and really
work on building slow-twitch muscle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hands me her notebook, which I quickly take a look at. The
training plan neatly notated on the calendar appears moderately
tough.
choice_data_list: This is some good stuff! Very detailed, too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: To be honest, I don't think I quite have what it takes to compete with the best of the best yet. I'm trying not to push myself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I just want to do what I can for now, 'cause I know it'll all work out for
me eventually!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's amazingly positive, hardworking, and down-to-earth. From the
little bit that I've seen of her over the last few days, I feel like we
would make a good team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if she doesn't stand out so much yet, I know that she definitely
has what it takes to shine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm? Somethin' up?
choice_data_list: Would you like to make a contract with me?
Would you like to make a contract with me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: A contract? Oh, wait! Is this a scouting offer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yay, I definitely accept! A big welcome, comin' from me to you, my
halfsies partner! Here's to sharing a lot more than just snacks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While quite normal in many ways, Matikanetannhauser is just peculiar
enough in others to ensure fun and fruitful days ahead.
